tasks.subject: Task 1: Verify DNS Resolution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm that `loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com` resolves to `4.194.232.85`. Blocking gate.

**Verify:** `dig +short loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com` → `4.194.232.85`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dig +short loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Domain resolves to 4.194.232.85"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Install and Configure Nginx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install Nginx and configure a reverse proxy virtual host for Odoo (web on 8069, longpolling on 8072).

**Verify:** `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login` → `200`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["/etc/nginx/sites-available/odoo"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" http://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Nginx installed and running", "Virtual host configured", "nginx -t passes", "HTTP proxy returns 200"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Install Certbot and Obtain SSL Certificate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install Certbot, obtain a Let's Encrypt SSL certificate, enable HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect.

**Verify:** `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login` → `200`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["/etc/nginx/sites-available/odoo"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" https://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Certbot installed", "SSL certificate obtained", "HTTPS returns 200", "HTTP redirects to HTTPS", "Auto-renewal dry-run passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Lock Down Odoo and Enable Proxy Mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bind Odoo to localhost and enable proxy mode so all traffic goes through Nginx.

**Verify:** `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login` → `200`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["/etc/odoo12.conf"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" https://loansmartproduction.encorefinancials.com/web/login", "acceptanceCriteria": ["proxy_mode = True in config", "xmlrpc_interface = 127.0.0.1", "netrpc_interface = 127.0.0.1", "HTTPS returns 200", "Direct IP access refused", "No critical log errors"]}
```
